# Every https?:// host literal in first-party shipped PHP (includes/, admin/,
# cli/, scolta.php, uninstall.php, vendor/tag1/scolta-php/src), one per line as
# "host<TAB>category". scripts/validate-dist.sh extracts the literals from the
# built zip and fails on any host missing here (new remote surface) or listed
# here but gone from the code (stale fixture).
#
# Categories:
#   service   — the plugin can contact this host. It must be opt-in
#               (WP.org Guidelines 7 & 9) and validate-dist.sh asserts it is
#               disclosed in readme.txt == External Services ==.
#   reference — appears only in comments, docs links, or UI link hrefs the
#               browser follows; the plugin never sends a request to it.
actionscheduler.org	reference
amazee.ai	reference
api.amazee.ai	service
api.anthropic.com	service
api.github.com	service
api.openai.com	service
github.com	service
myapp.ddev.site	reference
myapp.example.com	reference
www.gnu.org	reference
www.tag1.com	reference
